currentTask.context: Director session starting - reading feedback and deciding next action

gameQueue.title: Outlaw Auction
gameQueue.concept: Bounty hunter bidding war: auctions for captured outlaws on a frontier circuit. Each outlaw has a secret bounty value revealed only after purchase. Read behavioral tells from rival bidders to estimate true value - eager bidders signal high value, patient ones signal low. Bluff, fold, or overbid. First hidden-value auction with behavioral AI in series.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First hidden-information economic game (vs Cattle Auction which had known grades), first behavioral-tell reading mechanic on economic decisions, first bidding game where rivals reveal information through their bidding patterns

gameQueue.title: Hangman's Bluff
gameQueue.concept: Interrogation deception game: you're an outlaw bluffing through a checkpoint. The sheriff asks questions - alibi, travel route, wanted poster ID. Each answer shifts your suspicion meter. Choose truths strategically and lies carefully. Wrong answers compound; consistent lies hold up better than mixed ones. First player-side deception / narrative-interrogation mechanic in series.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First narrative interrogation mechanic where player is the deceiver (vs Wanted: Dead or Alive where player was investigator), first game with answer consistency tracking (lie memory), first branching-consequence dialogue system

gameQueue.title: Lariat Spin
gameQueue.concept: Physics-based rope spinning skill game. Tap rhythmically to build angular momentum on a spinning lasso loop; the rope physics simulate circular tension, drift, and collapse. Once momentum is high enough, release at the precise angle to catch a moving target. Targets escalate in speed and height. First rotational physics / skill-toy mechanic in series.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First rotational rope physics simulation (vs constraint-based pendulum in Last Rope Standing), first skill-toy mechanic (spinning, not throwing), first momentum-accumulation + precision-release dual-phase in series

runLog.summary: Built Game 41: Gold Panner - particle physics pan-tilt, density stratification, claim jumper, 22 tests pass.
Built Game 42: Coyote Call - real-time pitch matching, oscilloscope dual-waveform, coyote howl synthesis, trust/scare dual meter, 26 tests pass.
Fixed Midnight Rodeo: added roundRect polyfill (missing in Chrome <99/Safari <15.4) and touch-action:none on canvas. 36 tests pass.
Fixed Midnight Rodeo: added touchstart handler; devices that do not fire pointerdown for touch now respond. 38 tests pass.
Fixed Last Rope Standing: directional kick mechanic (KICK_FORCE=500) gives players speed to reach higher platforms. 55 tests pass.
Fixed Midnight Rodeo: iOS position:fixed viewport, load-event resize, document-level touch fallback, guard condition fix. 39 tests pass.
Built Game 43: Wanted: Reward - visual search + composite matching, 4-trait crowd silhouettes, economic payout, 35 tests pass.
Built Game 44: Trail Blaze - player-drawn pathfinding, 5 terrain types, A* comparison, escalating threats, 35 tests pass.
Built Game 45: Rattlesnake Round-Up - multi-phase hold+drag snake wrangling, thermal scope view, 3 snake tiers, 24 tests pass.
